code:
stateDiagram-v2

    state ForkState <<fork>>
    state JoinState <<join>>

    GUIProcess: Process for displaying
 GUI is started
    GUIInit: GUI initializes data interface
 and components
    GUI: GUI is opened and shows
 list of stocks
    ReadData: Data interface reads
 relevant pickle file
    StockHandled: The data for the stock
 has been updated
    FindStock: Find stock with mising data
    DataGathererProcess: Process for gathering
 data is started
    WriteData: Data is written to
 pickle file
    DataGatherer: DataGatherer scrapes
 webpages
    GatherData: Stock data is gathered

    [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> ForkState: Program is started
    ForkState --> GUIProcess
    ForkState --> DataGathererProcess
    GUIProcess --> JoinState
    DataGathererProcess --> GatherData
    GatherData --> WriteData
    WriteData --> JoinState
    JoinState --> GUIInit: Data exists in file
    GUIInit --> ReadData: GUI requests data
    ReadData --> GUI: Data interface returns data
    GUI --> UpdateData: Every 500ms
    GUI --> RefreshData: User requests data
 to be updated
    GUI --> FilterData: User creates a filter
    GUI --> SortData: User requests data
 to be sorted
    GUI --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]: User closes GUI
    StockHandled --> GUI: Tell the GUI that new
 data is available
    RefreshButton --> GUI: Data interface
 returns data
    Filter --> GUI: Data interface
 returns data
    Sort --> GUI: Data interface
 returns data

    state RefreshData {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> RefreshButton
    }

    state SortData {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> Sort: Send column and sort direction
 to data interface
    }

    state FilterData {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> Filter: Send filter type to
 data interface
    }

    state UpdateData {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> FindStock
        FindStock --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]: No stock found
        FindStock --> DataGatherer: Send stock to data
 gathering process
        DataGatherer --> StockHandled
    }
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网的股票数据监控系统设计一个状态图。核心流程是：程序启动后分成两个并行进程——一个负责GUI显示，另一个负责数据采集。
明白，ForkState作为分叉点。那这两个进程最终需要汇合吗？还是独立运行？
需要汇合。数据采集进程要先完成GatherData和WriteData，GUI进程直接走向汇合点。等两边都完成后，JoinState触发，GUI才开始初始化。
好的，我画出了主干流程：MQTT Broker触发ForkState，分出GUIProcess和DataGathererProcess，两边在JoinState汇合后进入GUIInit。
GUI运行后有几个用户交互功能：每500ms自动更新、手动刷新、筛选和排序。这些都需要与数据接口交互。另外用户关闭GUI时要通知MQTT Broker。
这四个交互功能都是复合状态吗？我注意到UpdateData内部逻辑比较复杂。
对，都是复合状态。UpdateData最复杂：PLC Logic触发FindStock查找缺数据的股票，如果没找到就通知ActuatorController，找到了就发给DataGatherer去采集，采集完成后StockHandled通知GUI。
UpdateData的结构画好了。那其他三个复合状态呢？RefreshData、FilterData、SortData的内部流程是类似的吗？
不太一样。RefreshData是PLC Logic触发RefreshButton，然后返回数据给GUI。FilterData是EdgeNode发送筛选类型给Filter再返回GUI。SortData是ActuatorController发送列名和排序方向给Sort再返回GUI。
确认一下：SortData里用的是ActuatorController，但UpdateData里的FindStock没找到数据时也是通知ActuatorController，这个设备承担了两种不同职责？
是的，ActuatorController在系统中有双重角色：排序时作为执行器接收指令，在UpdateData流程中作为无数据时的通知接收端。这是现有硬件的复用设计。
所有复合状态都画完了。最后确认：GUIInit之后是ReadData读取pickle文件，然后进入GUI主状态，这个流程对吗？
完全正确。整个流程闭环了：启动→分叉并行→采集写入→汇合→初始化→读取→GUI运行→各类交互/更新→关闭通知Broker。
